homepage.about_text_1: AgencyCheck is an independent worker transparency platform. We help workers in the Netherlands understand their rights, compare agencies, and make informed decisions before starting work.
homepage.about_text_2: Our agency data comes from the official ABU (employment agency federation) member register. Housing, transport, and salary data is supplemented with worker-reported experiences.
homepage.about_text_3: We do not charge agencies for listings. We are not affiliated with any employment agency. Our goal is to help workers, not agencies. All data is clearly labeled by source and verification status.

jobs_accommodation.cities_title: 📍 Main cities for jobs with accommodation
jobs_accommodation.checklist_1: → Get the weekly housing cost in writing: €80–€110/week is typical.
jobs_accommodation.checklist_2: → Check if the accommodation is SNF-certified (safety standard for migrant workers).
jobs_accommodation.checklist_3: → Your gross pay minus housing must still be at or above WML: €{wml}/hr.
jobs_accommodation.checklist_4: → Ask what happens to your housing if the job ends.
jobs_accommodation.checklist_5: → Read the contract in a language you understand before signing.
jobs_accommodation.footer_note: Salary and agency data sourced from worker reports. AgencyCheck is independent — not affiliated with any agency.
jobs_accommodation.no_active_listings: No active listings at this time.

calculator_page.heading: 🧮 Real Income Calculator
calculator_page.subheading: A higher gross rate doesn't always mean more money. Compare two agency offers after Dutch income tax, housing deductions, transport, and healthcare.
calculator_page.tax_notice: 💡 Includes Dutch tax (loonheffing 2026): Brackets 36.97% / 37.97% / 49.5%. Housing deductions are taken from net pay — on top of tax. An agency offering €12.50/hr with free accommodation can beat one at €14.50/hr after deductions. WML minimum wage 2026 = €{wml}/hr.
calculator_page.winner_text: Scenario {winner} gives {gap}/hr more effective purchasing power.
calculator_page.calc_note: Calculations assume 48 working weeks/year and estimate loonheffing at 2026 rates without heffingskortingen. Actual net pay may be higher due to tax credits.
calculator_page.snf_note_detail: Always check your contract for exact deduction amounts. SNF-certified agencies must follow maximum deduction limits.

agencies_with_housing.heading: Agencies with housing in the Netherlands
agencies_with_housing.subheading: Real photos submitted by workers — bedrooms, bathrooms, kitchens, and shared facilities. See what the housing actually looks like before you sign up. Click any photo to view full screen.
agencies_with_housing.about_text: Photos and housing status are worker-reported. "Confirmed" means multiple workers said housing was provided. "Unknown" means we have no reliable data yet — always ask the agency directly before you travel.
agencies_with_housing.photos_section_sub: {totalPhotos} real photos · {agencyCount} agencies · click any photo to open full screen
agencies_with_housing.no_confirmed_sub: Check back as more workers submit reports.
agencies_with_housing.unknown_section_sub_singular: {count} agency — not yet confirmed or denied
agencies_with_housing.unknown_section_sub_plural: {count} agencies — not yet confirmed or denied
agencies_with_housing.unknown_note: These agencies have not been confirmed or denied on housing availability. Contact them directly to find out. If you have worked with one of these agencies and know about their housing, please leave a review.
agencies_with_housing.cta_sub: Share photos and your experience to help other workers know what to expect.
agencies_with_housing.footer_note: Housing data and photos are community-reported and informational only. AgencyCheck does not guarantee housing availability or conditions.

agency_detail.housing_cost_sub: Deducted from your salary by the agency
agency_detail.people_per_room_sub: Agency worker accommodation — shared rooms common
agency_detail.transport_cost_sub: Bus to factory / warehouse — often deducted
agency_detail.confirm_warning: Always confirm in writing before starting
agency_detail.confirm_warning_text: Shared rooms are common. Ask exactly: weekly housing deduction, people per room, transport cost.
agency_detail.confirm_warning_text_housing: This agency provides housing — confirm all terms before signing.
agency_detail.calc_disclaimer: 📊 Based on worker reports — not agency estimates. Always confirm details directly with the agency.
agency_detail.issues_title: Problems workers experience at agencies like {agencyName}
agency_detail.issue_shared_rooms: Shared rooms — 2 to 4 people per room
agency_detail.issue_shared_rooms_detail: Overcrowded accommodation is standard, not an exception. Workers rarely have privacy.
agency_detail.issue_housing_deduction_detail: Deducted automatically before you see your payslip. Rarely disclosed upfront.
agency_detail.issue_transport_detail: Bus to the factory costs €20–€40/week — taken from your wage without clear agreement.
agency_detail.issue_poor_housing: Poor housing conditions — cold, damp, overcrowded
agency_detail.issue_poor_housing_detail: Old houses with inadequate heating, mould, or broken facilities. Workers have no alternative if tied to agency housing.
agency_detail.issue_contract: Contract unclear or in Dutch only
agency_detail.issue_contract_detail: Workers sign contracts they don't understand. What you're agreeing to is often not explained.
agency_detail.issue_disclaimer: Based on worker reports — not verified by agency. Always confirm details directly with {agencyName}.
agency_detail.review_cta_sub: Anonymous · Takes 60 seconds · No account needed · Helps other workers

agency_detail.footer_disclaimer: All reviews, salary reports, and complaints are worker-reported and informational. AgencyCheck is not affiliated with any employment agency. Not legal or employment advice. In doubt?
